title: USDA NASS to host webinar to highlight available data for recently discontinued programs
summary: U.S. farmers are expected to produce 1.28 billion bushels of winter wheat this year, according to the Crop Production report released today by USDA’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS). title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: May 9, 2024
summary: May 9, 2024: The sea ice has continued to decrease this week at a lower rate of 1.44% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 3.15%), from the level on 05/02/2024 of 13.374 M km 2 to 13.181 M km 2 for this week. title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 6 May, 2024
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 6 May, 2024 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: Tribally Approved Child Care Options Expand
